_comment: Folio legal docs manifest. Source of truth for the latest ToS / Privacy version: a GitHub Action syncs this into Supabase tos_versions (which the app reads), and it is also bundled into the app as an offline fallback. Bump version + summary when ToS / Privacy changes.

terms.summary_zh: v1.4：修改部分敘述用詞使表述更精確一致；無實質條款變更。
terms.summary_en: v1.4: Minor wording revisions for clarity and consistency; no substantive change.

privacy.summary_zh: v1.4：配合後續版本新增之「地區（選填）」個人檔案欄位，於「收集之個人資料」與「用戶間之顯示」補齊相關蒐集揭露；另於「用戶間之顯示」補充揭露性別 / 年齡對其他用戶之顯示範圍及新增之隱藏開關；並修改部分敘述用詞使表述更精確一致（不涉權利義務變更）。
privacy.summary_en: v1.4: Adds the necessary disclosures for the optional "Region" profile field (introduced in a later app version) under "Data We Collect" and "Inter-user visibility"; also clarifies under "Inter-user visibility" how gender / age are shown to other users and documents the new hide toggles; minor wording revisions for clarity and consistency (no change to rights or obligations).
